title: Star Wars: Obsession

Haden Blackman|Haden Blackman]] |penciller=[[Brian Ching]] |inker= |letterer=[[Michael David Thomas]] |colorist=[[Sno Cone Studios]] |cover artist=*Brian Ching *[[Brad Anderson]] |editor=[[Randy Stradley]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |start date=[[November 24]], [[2004]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54459/star_wars_obsession_2004_1|text=Star Wars: Obsession (2004) #1}} |end date=[[May 18]], [[2005]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54463/star_wars_obsession_2004_5|text=Star Wars: Obsession (2004) #5}} |schedule= |format=Completed |issues=5 |timeline=c. [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Obsession''''' is a series of comics published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. It ran from [[November 24]], [[2004]] to [[May 18]], [[2005]]. The concept of the series was to lead directly into [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|Episode III]], but publication delays prolonged the release of the final issue until the day before the release of the film. ==Plot summary== Consumed by the belief that the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] still lives, Obi-Wan Kenobi has temporarily forsaken his duties and recruited Anakin Skywalker in his desperate hunt for Ventress. Anakin believed he himself killed Ventress and that Obi-Wan is 'chasing a ghost'. And Anakin's doubts about his former Master's quest are not assuaged when, following the trail of the rumors of Ventress' existence, they walk into a trap set by their old enemies, the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Durge/Legends|Durge]] and [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Obsession}} ===Issues=== {| {{Prettytable}} ! colspan="3" |Color code key: |- |style="background-color:#FFBB60;" width="24%" align="center"|Collected (TPB) issue |style="background-color:#40CC40;" width="24%" align="center"|Released issue |style="background-color:#FFFF80;" width="24%" align="center"|Future issue |} {| {{Prettytable}} !
